prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-SSFUNNEL-BUN Product Type: FUNNEL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Flask Funnel Camping Gear (1-1/2 Inch Diameter with 3/8 Inch Spout) Description: Simplify pouring and storage tasks like never before with the ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Funnel. Designed for precision and convenience, this funnel is the perfect tool for transferring liquids into flasks, jars, bottles, or other small containers without the mess.

Measuring 2 inches in height with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter, and a 3/8 inch spout, it fits perfectly with flasks that have a 3/8 inch spout opening. Crafted from premium 304 stainless steel, this funnel is built for durability and long lasting use. Its 0.55mm thickness ensures strength while remaining lightweight and easy to handle, making it a reliable and handy addition to outdoor gear.

Perfect Size for Flasks – 2 inches tall with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter and 3/8 inch spout, ideal for flask openings

Durable 304 Stainless Steel – Rust resistant construction for longevity

Precision Pouring – Prevents spills and mess when transferring liquids

Lightweight & Strong – 0.55mm thickness for reliable daily use Search Terms: hip flask stainless steel silver trekking hiking snowboarding skiing backpacking camping gear RV camp kitchen beverage tailgating ASR Outdoor whiskey water alcohol gifts wilderness adventure groomsmen boating drinking cups campfire BBQ Features: - PERFECT SIZE FOR FLASKS - 2 inches tall with a 1-1/2 inch mouth diameter and 3/8 inch spout, ideal for flask openings - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - 304 stainless steel rust resistant construction for longevity - PRECISION POURING - Prevents spills and mess when transferring liquids - LIGHTWEIGHT AND STRONG - 0.55mm thickness for reliable daily use - REFILL ON THE GO - Ideal for refilling your favorite beverages while out adventuring, camping, hiking, backpacking and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 304 Stainless Steel Flask Funnel

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1-1/2 Inch Stainless Steel Flask Funnel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 15 Inch Diameter, 38 Inch Spout, Rust Resistant, Precision Pouring, Lightweight And Strong

openai.title_differentiation: 304 Stainless Steel, 1-12 Inch Mouth, 38 Inch Spout, Rust Resistant, Spill-Free Pouring
